ddls:
CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the survey started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the survey ended */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survey */,
  "survey_status" TEXT /* Status of the survey (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "survey_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the survey (e.g., annually, bi-annually) */,
  "survey_scope" TEXT /* Scope of the survey (e.g., national, regional, city-specific) */,
  "survey_methodology" TEXT /* Brief description of the survey methodology used */,
  "survey_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "household_types" (
  "household_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household type */,
  "household_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the household type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the household type */,
  "average_household_size" INTEGER /* Average number of members in the household type */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income for the household type */,
  "common_issues" TEXT /* Common issues or challenges faced by the household type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("household_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "satisfaction_levels" (
  "satisfaction_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each satisfaction level */,
  "satisfaction_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the satisfaction level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the satisfaction level */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code for visualization purposes */,
  "score_range" TEXT /* Score range for the satisfaction level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("satisfaction_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey result */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey */,
  "satisfaction_level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the satisfaction level */,
  "household_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household type */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the survey */,
  "n" INTEGER /* Sample size (n) */,
  "percent" REAL /* Percentage of the sample */,
  "lower_confidence" REAL /* Lower confidence interval */,
  "upper_confidence" REAL /* Upper confidence interval */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value (if applicable) */,
  "survey_location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey location */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the result */,
  "sample_variance" REAL /* Variance of the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_results_satisfaction_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("satisfaction_level_id") REFERENCES satisfaction_levels ("satisfaction_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_results_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_results_household_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_type_id") REFERENCES household_types ("household_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_results_survey_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_location_id") REFERENCES survey_locations ("survey_location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_results_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "geographical_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates (latitude and longitude) of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the location (e.g., North, South, East, West) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_locations" (
  "survey_location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey location */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size for the survey in the specific location */,
  "response_rate" REAL /* Response rate for the survey in the specific location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_locations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_locations_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "household_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household type */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the household members */,
  "income_bracket" TEXT /* Income bracket of the household */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the household members */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the household members */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the household members */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the household members */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the household members */,
  "number_of_children" INTEGER /* Number of children in the household */,
  "household_income" REAL /* Total household income */,
  "number_of_vehicles" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles owned by the household */,
  "housing_type" TEXT /* Type of housing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_demographics" (
  "survey_demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey demographic record */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic record */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size for the demographic in the specific survey */,
  "response_rate" REAL /* Response rate for the demographic in the specific survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_demographics_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_demographics_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the survey */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* File format (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., online survey, paper survey) */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the quality of the data (e.g., 1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* File format (e.g., TXT, PDF) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., online survey, paper survey) */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the quality of the data (e.g., 1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_errors" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data error */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey where the error was reported */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the error */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date the error was reported */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the error (e.g., open, closed, in progress) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the error */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the error (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the error was resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes on how the error was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_errors_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_errors_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of version (e.g., major, minor, patch) */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Detailed release notes for the version */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who approved the version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)
